title: stelis obescula
intro: Stelis obescula is a species of orchid native to Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis obescula include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
